message:
test(command-palette): add 11 unit tests for command palette widget

Cover ActionItem builder fields/defaults, PaletteAction equality,
MatchFilter::allows for All and specific types, Default trait,
with_max_visible builder, scorer_stats accessor, selected_match/results
iterators, set_match_filter narrowing, and Enter with no results.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
